title: Education
intro: A compact reading path: engineering fundamentals, modern backend specialization, and deeper software practice shaped by AI.

thesis.label: Signal for leaders
thesis.text: This education supports engineering decisions across architecture, backend, cloud, performance, integration, and product judgment.

items.emphasis: Engineering foundation for reasoning about systems, networks, software, and real execution constraints.
proofPoints: Formal base for discussing architecture, software, and infrastructure
Technical range to connect product, code, and infrastructure

items.emphasis: Deeper practice in a pragmatic services stack, concurrency, and performance for stronger backend and platform dialogue.
proofPoints: Sharper reading of contracts between applications, services, and APIs
Sensitivity to cost, latency, and service design

items.emphasis: Ongoing formation to treat AI as part of the engineering cycle: requirements, validation, automation, and technical governance.
proofPoints: Current positioning on AI applied to software
Attention to quality criteria, risk, and maintainability
